goal: Build a sim-to-real-gap measurement: replay a real-world rosbag of joint targets, measure deviation between sim observations and real recorded ones. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #14 (sim-to-real engineer / robotics R&D persona).
thoughts: Sim2real-gap = compare sim observations to real ones for same input. Used for sim2real fidelity tuning.
replay_rosbag plays back recorded joint commands from a real Franka. Sim runs same trajectory.
compare_sim_real_video aligns sim camera output with real video frame-by-frame.
measure_sim_real_gap returns numerical deviation (joint pos RMSE, EE position RMSE).
Function-gate N/A. Validation = gap_metric.json file emitted with RMSE values.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[-0.4, 0, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15])

configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/SimCamera",
    position=[0.5, 0.5, 1.20],
    look_at=[0.4, 0.2, 0.83],
    fov=60,
)

replay_rosbag(
    bag_path="/data/sim2real/franka_pickplace_real.bag",
    target_robot="/World/Franka",
    speed=1.0,
)

compare_sim_real_video(
    sim_camera="/World/SimCamera",
    real_video="/data/sim2real/franka_pickplace_real.mp4",
    output_path="/tmp/sim2real_compare.mp4",
)

measure_sim_real_gap(
    sim_robot="/World/Franka",
    real_data_path="/data/sim2real/franka_pickplace_real.bag",
    metrics=["joint_pos_rmse", "ee_pos_rmse", "ee_orient_rmse"],
    output_path="/tmp/sim2real_gap.json",
)
extension_notes: Sim2real-gap canonical. Requires real-recorded rosbag at /data/sim2real/. Without that asset, replay_rosbag returns immediately. Validation = /tmp/sim2real_gap.json populated.
failure_modes: Real rosbag at /data/sim2real/ not available — handler may return error
compare_sim_real_video requires camera frames to be timestamp-aligned — sim camera capture rate must match real
joint_pos_rmse computation assumes joint name parity between sim Franka and real Franka URDF
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; BUILD_OK 17/18; 1 error on replay_rosbag (needs real rosbag asset)
